description: d02 3km case3 (OOM-safe segmented _advance_chunk harness, --segment-steps 60), full-domain T2 vs corpus L3 d02, through the alb-from-phb fix. The d02 full-pipeline diagnosis harness OOMed (16GiB single XLA intermediate on 159x66 grid, infra limit not the fix); this segmented harness routes the same _refresh_grid_p_from_finished->diagnose_pressure_al_alt path.
note: Pressure-Exner half of the d02 T2 bias removed; warm bias near zero. d02 still carries a smaller theta-side PBL residual at mid-leads (12h 1.35K) but 6h/24h drop below the prior numbers across the board.
